title: BEATS Studio Pro Wireless Bluetooth Noise-Cancelling Headphones - Sandstone

keySpecs.label: Quick setup with Google Fast Pair

crossSellProducts.title: VELD VH30DW Super-Fast 30 W 2-port USB Wall Charger - White
BELKIN Braided USB-C to USB-A Cable - 1 m

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: These Beats Studio Pro headphones help shut out the hubbub around you with Pure Adaptive Noise-Cancelling. It actively blocks out background noise and lets you focus on your music, podcast or movie.
goodToKnow: Take calls, skip tracks and adjust the volume without reaching for your phone.
Up to 24 hours of playback on a single charge - turn off ANC and it jumps to 40 hours.
Fast Fuel gives up to 4 hours of battery life from a 10-minute charge.
Personalised Spatial Audio and dynamic head tracking.
Voice targeting microphones for clear calls.
